# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "resourceGroup": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/functions",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('functionName')]",
      "properties": {
        "serverless": true,
        "managedIdentityEnabled": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat('Managed Identity Role Assignment for ', parameters('functionName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/Contributor",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName')), '2022-05-01-preview').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat('Storage Blob Data Reader Role Assignment for ', parameters('functionName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/Reader",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName')), '2022-05-01-preview').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat('Key Vault Reader Role Assignment for ', parameters('functionName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/Reader",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName')), '2022-05-01-preview').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat('SQL Reader Role Assignment for ', parameters('functionName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/Reader",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName')), '2022-05-01-preview').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerName'), variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2018-09-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat('Cosmos DB Reader Role Assignment for ', parameters('functionName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roles/Reader",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName')), '2022-05-01-preview').identity.principalId]",
        "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', variables('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "managedIdentityClientId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/functions', parameters('functionName')), '2022-05-01-preview').identity.principalId]"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageAccountName": "your_storage_account_name",
    "keyVaultName": "your_key_vault_name",
    "sqlServerName": "your_sql_server_name",
    "sqlDatabaseName": "your_sql_database_name",
    "cosmosDbAccountName": "your_cosmos_db_account_name"
  }
}
